name: Apple-Butter Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a temperature that will produce a light crust.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake the bread until it is cooked through and golden brown on top.
5. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
